subcodes.first_line: O God my God! Protect this servant from the evil of self and passion, and illumine him with the light of righteousness and piety.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی این عبد را از شر نفس و هوی حفظ فرما و بنور بر و تقوی مزین دار ای
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for purity; chastity
